reason: Agent successfully executed browser tool calls to navigate to example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and reported the correct result.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with title "Gamut" and displayed the agent list in the sidebar.
Clicked on the "QA-20260706-163619-2jkl" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened and displayed the chat interface with message input field.
Typed and sent the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was successfully sent to the agent.
Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent completed its work in 12 seconds and provided the full response with browser tool outputs.

Verified the response contains "Example Domain" — The response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain"." and also confirms: "Done — the page at https://example.com has the title "Example Domain". I've closed the browser." The agent successfully executed three browser tools: Open Browser (navigated to https://example.com), Browser MCP: Browser Get State (retrieved page information), and Close Browser (closed the session). All tool calls executed successfully as indicated by green checkmarks.
